descriptions.text: Join Mario Mario and Todd the Toad on their journey to infiltrate Sam's Club, all to experience the taste of the elusive rotisserie chicken. Be on the lookout for traps and trolls as you bypass Sam's Club's security - all for the ultimate mission!

Mario finds himself on an unlikely covert mission: to breach the walls of a big-box retail stronghold in pursuit of the legendary rotisserie chicken. Teaming up with Todd the Toad, he must navigate through twisted architecture, subvert traps laid by mischievous level design, and endure a barrage of unexpected obstacles. What begins as a simple infiltration quickly unravels into a chaotic sprint through satire, misdirection, and consumer madness.
